title: AP8L
excerpt: 2 AP8L is an APL-inspired programming language embdedded inside PICO-8. It's not exactly compatible with APL\360, but it can do almost everything APL\360 can.
content_html:
2

AP8L is an APL-inspired programming language embdedded inside PICO-8. It's not exactly compatible with APL\360, but it can do almost everything APL\360 can. The main differences are that AP8L is slightly more modern, being inspired by leading-axis principles.

To see help about using the system, type )HELP and hit Enter. To enter a function, insert the ∇ symbol (Tab + G) and then the function header: R←F Y for a monad and R←X F Y for a dyad. You can of course change all the names; R is the name of the variable that contains the result; F is the name of the function, X is the name of the left argument and Y is the name of the right argument. Write lines and when you're done send ∇ on an empty line to save the function.

For loading code from a file, you can use )LOAD DROP after dropping a file in the cartridge. Make sure it's encoded as bytes, and not as a p8 text file nor in actual Unicode. You can see the order glyphs appear in with ⎕AV. To save a function, use )SAVE <function name> OUT to write it to the output file; to save an array use the same syntax with the name of the array.

Primitives are well documented inside )HELP; quad names are undocumented for now.

The only support for graphics right now (unless you use ⎕PK to poke stuff) is lines. Start by writing )SPLIT 16, which will allocate the first 16 lines of the screen for graphics. ⎕CLS <color> clears that part of the screen. ⎕LINE takes either a 4-vector or a n×4 matrix. Each vector is the start X, start Y, end X, end Y coordinates. It also optionally accepts a left argument color.

If you really like this and want to favorite it, type )PAUSE to open up the pause menu.

sentences.en: AP8L is an APL-inspired programming language embdedded inside PICO-8.
sentences.zh: AP8L 是一种嵌入 PICO-8 中的受 APL 启发的编程语言。

sentences.en: It's not exactly compatible with APL\360, but it can do almost everything APL\360 can.
sentences.zh: 它与 APL\360 并不完全兼容，但它几乎可以完成 APL\360 能做的所有事情。

sentences.en: The main differences are that AP8L is slightly more modern, being inspired by leading-axis principles.
sentences.zh: 主要区别在于 AP8L 受到引导轴原理的启发，稍微现代一些。

sentences.en: To see help about using the system, type )HELP and hit Enter.
sentences.zh: 要查看有关使用系统的帮助，请键入 )HELP 并按 Enter 键。

sentences.en: To enter a function, insert the ∇ symbol (Tab + G) and then the function header: R←F Y for a monad and R←X F Y for a dyad.
sentences.zh: 要输入函数，请插入 ∇ 符号 (Tab + G)，然后插入函数标题：R←F Y 表示单子，R←X F Y 表示二元。

sentences.en: You can of course change all the names; R is the name of the variable that contains the result; F is the name of the function, X is the name of the left argument and Y is the name of the right argument.
sentences.zh: 您当然可以更改所有名称； R 是包含结果的变量的名称； F 是函数的名称，X 是左侧参数的名称，Y 是右侧参数的名称。

sentences.en: Write lines and when you're done send ∇ on an empty line to save the function.
sentences.zh: 编写行，完成后在空行上发送 ∇ 以保存函数。

blocks.html_en: For loading code from a file, you can use )LOAD DROP after dropping a file in the cartridge. Make sure it's encoded as bytes, and not as a p8 text file nor in actual Unicode. You can see the order glyphs appear in with ⎕AV. To save a function, use )SAVE <function name> OUT to write it to the output file; to save an array use the same syntax with the name of the array.

sentences.en: For loading code from a file, you can use )LOAD DROP after dropping a file in the cartridge.
sentences.zh: 要从文件加载代码，您可以在将文件放入盒中后使用 )LOAD DROP。

sentences.en: Make sure it's encoded as bytes, and not as a p8 text file nor in actual Unicode.
sentences.zh: 确保它被编码为字节，而不是 p8 文本文件或实际的 Unicode。

sentences.en: You can see the order glyphs appear in with ⎕AV.
sentences.zh: 您可以通过 ⎕AV 看到字形出现的顺序。

sentences.en: To save a function, use )SAVE <function name> OUT to write it to the output file; to save an array use the same syntax with the name of the array.
sentences.zh: 要保存函数，请使用 )SAVE <函数名称> OUT 将其写入输出文件；要保存数组，请使用与数组名称相同的语法。

blocks.html_en: Primitives are well documented inside )HELP; quad names are undocumented for now.

sentences.en: Primitives are well documented inside )HELP; quad names are undocumented for now.
sentences.zh: 原语在 )HELP 中有详细记录；四边形名称目前尚未记录。

blocks.html_en: The only support for graphics right now (unless you use ⎕PK to poke stuff) is lines. Start by writing )SPLIT 16, which will allocate the first 16 lines of the screen for graphics. ⎕CLS <color> clears that part of the screen. ⎕LINE takes either a 4-vector or a n×4 matrix. Each vector is the start X, start Y, end X, end Y coordinates. It also optionally accepts a left argument color.

sentences.en: The only support for graphics right now (unless you use ⎕PK to poke stuff) is lines.
sentences.zh: 目前对图形的唯一支持（除非你使用 ⎕PK 来戳东西）是线条。

sentences.en: Start by writing )SPLIT 16, which will allocate the first 16 lines of the screen for graphics. ⎕CLS <color> clears that part of the screen. ⎕LINE takes either a 4-vector or a n×4 matrix.
sentences.zh: 首先编写)SPLIT 16，它将为图形分配屏幕的前 16 行。 ⎕CLS <颜色> 清除屏幕的该部分。 ⎕LINE 采用 4 向量或 n×4 矩阵。

sentences.en: Each vector is the start X, start Y, end X, end Y coordinates.
sentences.zh: 每个向量都是起始 X、起始 Y、结束 X、结束 Y 坐标。

sentences.en: It also optionally accepts a left argument color.
sentences.zh: 它还可以选择接受左参数颜色。

blocks.html_en: If you really like this and want to favorite it, type )PAUSE to open up the pause menu.

sentences.en: If you really like this and want to favorite it, type )PAUSE to open up the pause menu.
sentences.zh: 如果您真的喜欢这个并且想收藏它，请输入 )PAUSE 打开暂停菜单。

content_html_zh:
2

AP8L 是一种嵌入 PICO-8 中的受 APL 启发的编程语言。 它与 APL\360 并不完全兼容，但它几乎可以完成 APL\360 能做的所有事情。 主要区别在于 AP8L 受到引导轴原理的启发，稍微现代一些。

要查看有关使用系统的帮助，请键入 )HELP 并按 Enter 键。 要输入函数，请插入 ∇ 符号 (Tab + G)，然后插入函数标题：R←F Y 表示单子，R←X F Y 表示二元。 您当然可以更改所有名称； R 是包含结果的变量的名称； F 是函数的名称，X 是左侧参数的名称，Y 是右侧参数的名称。 编写行，完成后在空行上发送 ∇ 以保存函数。

要从文件加载代码，您可以在将文件放入盒中后使用 )LOAD DROP。 确保它被编码为字节，而不是 p8 文本文件或实际的 Unicode。 您可以通过 ⎕AV 看到字形出现的顺序。 要保存函数，请使用 )SAVE <函数名称> OUT 将其写入输出文件；要保存数组，请使用与数组名称相同的语法。

原语在 )HELP 中有详细记录；四边形名称目前尚未记录。

目前对图形的唯一支持（除非你使用 ⎕PK 来戳东西）是线条。 首先编写)SPLIT 16，它将为图形分配屏幕的前 16 行。 ⎕CLS <颜色> 清除屏幕的该部分。 ⎕LINE 采用 4 向量或 n×4 矩阵。 每个向量都是起始 X、起始 Y、结束 X、结束 Y 坐标。 它还可以选择接受左参数颜色。

如果您真的喜欢这个并且想收藏它，请输入 )PAUSE 打开暂停菜单。
